rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Petition For Revocation, Rescission, Reformation Or Cancellation Of Trust Amendments
rulings.Rulings: Motion To Dismiss Petition For Revocation, Rescission, Reformation Or Cancellation Of Trust Amendments is Off Calendar. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on May 25, 2011.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Jury Demand
rulings.Rulings: Motion To Strike Jury Demand is Granted except as to the Third Cause of Action for Elder Abuse. If any party wishes to contest the Tentative Ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on May 25, 2011.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE, PER 170.6 C.C.P. TO JUDGE sue m. kaplan
rulings.Rulings: PETITIONER LORI DEMARTINI, PAUL DEMARTINI MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE, PER 170.6 C.C.P. TO JUDGE Sue M. Kaplan

rulings.Case Title: IN RE CATHERINE R DEMARTINI REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 8/17/92, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition For Revocation Rescission, Reformation Or Cancellation Of Trust Amendments
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer To Petition For Revocation Rescission, Reformation Or Cancellation Of Trust Amendments is sustained with 30 days leave to amend. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on May 25, 2011.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DECLARATION OF TRUST OF THE DELBERT MITHCELL AND KATHERINE H. MITCHELL 1994 FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Trustee Janis Mitchell'S Petition For Settlement Of First Account And Report; For Order Of Conveyance Of Personal Property To Trust
rulings.Rulings: Trial taken off calendar pursuant to Settlement Agreement. Accounting petition moved to the regular probate calendar on June 1, 2011.
